name: Roblox
description: The user-generated gaming platform — Robux, Studio, hit games, and platform history.

questions.q: Who is the co-founder and CEO of Roblox Corporation?

source.notes: Co-founded with the late Erik Cassel.

questions.q: In what year did Roblox officially launch publicly?
Under what original name was Roblox first prototyped before its rebrand?
What is the in-game currency on Roblox called?
What is the older Roblox in-game currency that was discontinued in 2016?

source.notes: Tix (Tickets) — earned by daily login, removed April 2016.

questions.q: What programming language does Roblox Studio use for scripting?

source.notes: Luau is Roblox's typed superset of Lua.

questions.q: Which 2020 in-game Roblox concert by Lil Nas X drew tens of millions of viewers?

source.notes: Reportedly 33+ million unique attendees over the four-show run.

questions.q: Which iconic Roblox sound effect — used when an avatar dies — was a meme before being removed in 2022 over a licensing dispute?

source.notes: Composer Tommy Tallarico claimed the sound was from his 2000 game 'Messiah.' Replaced with a new default sound.

questions.q: What program allows Roblox developers to convert Robux into real money?
What is the primary tool used to build games on the Roblox platform?
What was the previous name of the 'Roblox Premium' membership?

source.notes: Builders Club rebranded as Roblox Premium in 2019.

questions.q: Which Roblox horror game, inspired by an indie PC title, has players escaping an angry math teacher who chases them with a wooden ruler?

source.notes: audit-corrected 2026-05-09: original premise ('baby with a hammer') was wrong — Baldi is a math teacher who slaps a ruler. The Roblox game is inspired by 'Baldi's Basics in Education and Learning.'

questions.q: Which Roblox virtual-pet game became one of the platform's most-played titles, with billions of visits?
Which obstacle-course-style game genre is colloquially known as a 'Roblox parkour game'?
On which year did Roblox Corporation go public on the New York Stock Exchange?

source.notes: Direct listing on the NYSE on March 10, 2021 (ticker RBLX).

questions.q: Which annual Roblox event was rebranded the 'Innovation Awards' in 2022?
What term refers to limited-edition Roblox items resellable in a player-driven marketplace?

source.notes: Often called 'Limiteds.' Premium membership required to trade.

questions.q: What is a 'Game Pass' on Roblox?
choices: A one-time purchase that unlocks a feature in a game

questions.q: What does the acronym 'UGC' stand for in the Roblox marketplace?

source.notes: Roblox opened the UGC catalog program more widely in 2023.

questions.q: Which year did Roblox introduce voice chat ('Spatial Voice') for verified adult users?

source.notes: Launched in 2022 as 'Spatial Voice' for users age 13+.
